Remedy  

Description

1: Increase Hitpoints by 208. Max: 483

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 167 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 1.75 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your wounds fade.
Cast on other: Soandso 's wounds fade away.

Game Description

Mends major wounds, healing between 208 and @1 hit points.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Remedy

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Remedy
ClassLevel
CLR51
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (13)
  • Sold By (5)
  • Screenshots

KOS there
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2005 at 8:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785013769
3 posts
Any advice on how to get this spell when I keep getting attacked by everything in zone?
▲ Page top
RE: KOS there
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2005 at 9:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783315326
Scholar
53 posts
If you are KOS in FV (now under new management!) and looking for Clarissa Heartweaver... all the former FV vendors and NPCs have relocated. They are now in the ruins of the Drolvarg fort in the eastern part of the zone. If you have the maps, look for an area across a small bridge as far east as you can go in FV.
▲ Page top
RE: KOS there
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2005 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591843534757
8 posts
anyone who cant get this or any other OT spell and are on Prexus server please send me an email at mladitaz or Crearwy I'll make arrangements with you and go get it .. My Chanter isn't kos .. infact she's apprehensive and with beguile she's amiable :) chanter's name is Gotkei

RE: KOS there

# Jul 09 2005 at 5:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363301773
View User Forum
25 posts
I purchased an illusion potion but be sure to /con as you go just in case someone sees through.
▲ Page top
Available in OT
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2003 at 2:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760189534
Scholar
50 posts
This spell is also available from Lissa T`Born in the Overthere.
▲ Page top
The real benefit of this spell is...
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2003 at 5:02 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1656893885060
11 posts
The fact that it's a 3 second cast time.

Compare to:
Superior Heal is 4.5 seconds.
Greater Heal is 3.75 seconds.

With this spell you have a quick casting heal to quickly pump some hp's into a person who's hurting.

I use it constantly on the robe type's who don't have many hp's and when they get hurt they need them fast.

Remedy to keep them alive, then switch to a more efficient heal to top off if need be.

Do I use this on a tank? No. Does it work great on a robe wearer like a chanter? Heck Yes.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 26 2003 at 12:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) These 51 lvl spells suck! This one is worse than superior!?
RE: What's the point?
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2003 at 11:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795362173
293 posts
Ok folks let me introduce all you younger clerics to your NEW HEAL SPELL LINE. The Remedy class heals are considered fast heals. They also have double the range of all other heal spells.

REMEDY: 175 mana to heal 438... Hey check this out 175 x 3 = 525 mana. 438 x 3 = 1314.

SUPERIOR HEAL : 250 mana to heal 583. or you can cast 250 x 2 = 500 mana to heal 583 x 2 = 1166.

When would a young and hot tempered cleric use such a 'suck' spell you might ask.
1. BAD PULL and your group is OVERRUN. Cleric cool as can be.... WHAM ( healing the puller who kept running ) WHAM ( heal that Shaman who was slowing ) WHAM ( Heal that chanter who is still Mesing ).

2. CASTERS who pissed off the mob, just lost SKIN or RUNE Protection are 9 times out of 10 going to run. This is a FACT because they are thinking survival. They are thinking about putting some distance between mob and themselves so they can Root, Snare , Mes , Stun etc.. Anything to save themselves. What a perfect time for a FAST , LONG RANGE , LOW MANA HEAL.

My 63 cleric always has the 51 REMEDY and the 61 SUPERNAL REMEDY memed. which btw has a 1.8 cast time. Cost 400 mana and heals 1450. Now you kick in the 10% bonus on that Lv 51 spell. You will have a nice fast long range heal that is eazy on the pocketbook. Something you can look forward to.
▲ Page top
RE: What's the point?
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2004 at 5:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788855623
274 posts
At level 38, doing a hard LDoN assasinate, the enchanter tash'd the named and got massive aggro for it. Not only was I not able to heal in time, but I'm not sure it would've reached far enough even if I had.

This would have been QUITE nice.

Also, if you're too LoM to cast superior heal (and you aren't CHing), but the tank needs a heal NOW, then you can cast this instead.
▲ Page top
RE: What's the point?
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2003 at 11:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591795362173
293 posts
Sorry my last line above omited SPELL HASTE. You kick in that 10% spell haste on your lv 51 Remedy and you .... Sorry about that. EDIT wouldnt work for me.
▲ Page top
RE: What's the point?
QuoteReply
# May 13 2003 at 4:07 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591746830688
View User Forum
Scholar
119 posts
It also has double the casting range of the other healing spells, which is handy in some situations.
▲ Page top
RE: What's the point?
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 12:59 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
Actually it's very similar to Chloroblast, lvl 55 Druid/Shaman spell. The only real use I have found for Chloroblast is that since it only takes 3 seconds to cast, you can pump a few hundered HPs into a tank to keep him alive long enough for a 10-second-cast CH to land.

Of course, this is a Cleric spell, so it really only makes sense to use it that way if you have two clerics in a group.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 26 2003 at 12:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) These 51 lvl spells suck! This one is worse than superior!?
